en: Do your job. Don't you tell me to dance.
Fine. Hey, hey! Fine! I am an athlete.
I am not an entertainer. Fine!
These are the ABCs of me, baby. I do not dance, and I do not start preseason
without a contract. Fine! Fine! Fine!
Jerry, I am out here for you.
You don't know what it's like to be me out here for you.
ko: 너는 내가 너를 위해 여기 있는 게 어떤 건지 몰라.

en: It is an up-at-dawn, pride-swallowing siege
that I will never fully tell you about, OK?
ko: 내가 절대 다 말해주지 않을 거라는 거 알아, 알겠어?

en: Help me, Rod. Help me help you.

ko: 내가 너를 도와줄 수 있도록 도와줘.
내가 너를 도와줄 수 있도록 도와줘.
